text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is here at last. I've got my
work cut out for me, going up against Opera O
and Doto, but there has to be a way!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then, suddenly, it starts raining! But for
someone like me who runs on any track, I can
work with poor conditions! In fact, that's where I
excel! LET'S GET IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll show 'em the tenacity of the All-Rounder!
That's right! A hero doesn't choose their
battlefield!
